proposal: Redirect legacy pricing URLs to the current pricing page.
counterarguments: Some legacy URLs may have query-specific intent that the pricing page does not fully answer.
conditions: Confirm the target page is indexable and self-canonical.
Monitor GSC landing page errors after deployment.
verification: Run redirect-chain adapter and crawl the final target URLs after deployment.
rollback: Restore the previous redirect rules if high-value URLs return errors or irrelevant targets.
